name: Pasta Bean Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 medium Red pepper, sliced into thin strips
30 ounce Beans, navy or pinto, Eden-organic (2 15-oz cans)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook pasta according to package directions.
2. Drain and cool the pasta.
3. While the pasta is cooking, bring 3 cups of water to a boil.
4. Blanch carrots and broccoli separately by dropping them into boiling, salted water for 1-3 minutes. Drain and rinse with cool water.
5. Mix together the pasta, beans, vegetables, and red pepper.
6. Prepare the salad dressing by mixing garlic, oil, umeboshi paste, and water in a blender.
7. Mix the dressing into the salad.
